message:
fix(acp): address critical review findings

Security:
- Validate file paths against session cwd for read_text_file/write_text_file
- Reject requests with missing path/contents params (INVALID_PARAMS)

Concurrency:
- Don't hold session mutex across prompt execution (take/put-back pattern)
- Add concurrent-prompt guard: reject with PROMPT_IN_PROGRESS if session
  already has an active prompt
- Use Option<AgentSession> to safely take session out during prompt

Protocol compliance:
- Fix StopReason formatting: use serde serialization instead of Debug format
- Set toolApproval capability to false (callback not yet implemented)

Cleanup:
- Remove dead abort_handle field from AcpSessionState
- Remove unused AcpPermissionRequest, AcpServerCapabilities, AcpServerInfo structs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
